raw.title: Rebellions Work — and They Represent a Long Tradition
raw.excerpt: Immigration enforcement is now facing renewed resistance across the country as Trump’s agents continue to harm, terrorize, and kill with impunity.

llm_processed.summary: Analyzes historical and contemporary rebellions as catalysts for systemic change, emphasizing grassroots movements and collective action.
llm_processed.lateral_potential: Bridges to designing resilient, decentralized networks for ecological and social transformation.
